title: Implement wallet connect UI trigger (open modal)
description: Replace the placeholder toast on the Connect Wallet buttons (signup and login) with the actual Web3Modal open call.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking 'Connect Wallet' on /signup opens the Web3Modal
Clicking 'Connect Wallet' on /login opens the Web3Modal
Modal displays MetaMask option and WalletConnect QR option
On wallet connection, the SIWE flow in TASK-039 is triggered automatically

steps.details: Replace the toast handler from TASK-013 with: import { modal } from './wallet-client.js'; document.getElementById('wallet-connect-btn').addEventListener('click', () => modal.open());
